mapper.insert: insert into equipment(supermarket_id, serial_number, contact_phone, money, status, sort, remark,online_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{data.supermarketId}, #{data.serialNumber}, #{data.contactPhone}, #{data.money}, #{data.status}, #{data.sort}, #{data.remark}, #{data.onlineStatus},now(), now())
mapper.update:
update equipment
supermarket_id = #{data.supermarketId},
serial_number = #{data.serialNumber},
contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone},
money = #{data.money},
status = #{data.status},
sort = #{data.sort},
remark = #{data.remark},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{data.id}

update equipment set delete_time = now() where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE serial_number = #{serialNumber} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM equipment WHERE online_status = 0 AND app_require_time <= #{checkTime} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.update:
update equipment
supermarket_id = #{data.supermarketId},
serial_number = #{data.serialNumber},
contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone},
money = #{data.money},
status = #{data.status},
online_status = #{data.onlineStatus},
sort = #{data.sort},
remark = #{data.remark},
version_id = #{data.versionId},
version_serial_number = #{data.versionSerialNumber},
`release` = #{data.release},
app_require_time = #{data.appRequireTime},
where id = #{data.id}
